entry.title: Re: Concern about "Inscriptions"
entry.summary: In a recent discussion about block sizes in the context of blockchain technology, an essential clarification was made regarding the common misconception that storage capacity is the primary issue. It's crucial to understand that the challenges associated with block sizes are not primarily about the ability to store large blocks. For those looking to deepen their understanding of this subject, it is advisable to explore educational resources that shed light on the nuances of this topic. An informative talk that addresses these misconceptions and provides foundational knowledge was highlighted; interested individuals can view this presentation [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CqNEQS80-h4&t=7s). This resource is particularly useful for those new to the discussion or in need of a refresher on the fundamental aspects of block sizes in blockchain technology.
